work_items.title: Remove duplicate title and description metadata
work_items.reason: Yandex Webmaster confirms 9 duplicate titles and 35 duplicate descriptions; staging audit confirms duplicate metadata clusters.
work_items.implementation_boundary: Prepare unique metadata in registry first; apply to staging pages in Tilda; transfer to production only after review.
acceptance_checks: Every indexed/staging page has a unique title.
Every indexed/staging page has a unique description.
Yandex Webmaster duplicate-title and duplicate-description warnings decrease after recrawl.
No page receives generic site-wide SEO copy unless it is intentionally noindex.

work_items.title: Diagnose 116 Google not-indexed pages
work_items.reason: Google Search Console shows only 29 indexed pages and 116 not indexed pages across 5 reason groups.
work_items.implementation_boundary: Use registry/seo/moonn-gsc-indexing-diagnostics.json as the first-pass diagnostic. Export full GSC URL lists before bulk page edits.
acceptance_checks: Each GSC exclusion reason is captured with count and sample URLs.
Pages are classified as keep noindex, canonical duplicate, thin/low value, unpublished/test, or fix-and-submit.
Sitemap and canonical rules are updated only after classification.
Validated pages are submitted for recrawl.

reason_groups.reason: Alternate page with proper canonical tag

next_reports: GSC -> export full URL list for each reason group

work_items.title: Connect Moonn/Kumskova/Yandex Services/MSU Istina entity graph
work_items.reason: Yandex query sample includes `татьяна кумскова мунн отзывы`; Yandex Services and MSU Istina use legal/platform name variants.
work_items.implementation_boundary: Add visible identity bridge and JSON-LD sameAs/alternateName to staging homepage first.
acceptance_checks: Visible biography/trust block mentions the public/legal name bridge naturally.
Person schema sameAs includes Yandex Services and MSU Istina.
No hidden-only SEO text; the identity link is visible to users.

work_items.title: Bind canonical Yandex Metrica counter to Yandex Webmaster
work_items.reason: Yandex Webmaster recommends binding Metrica; live HTML confirms counter 96397286 is canonical for moonn.ru.
work_items.implementation_boundary: This changes Yandex account/site settings; ask for explicit confirmation immediately before clicking the final bind/save action.
acceptance_checks: Yandex Webmaster shows counter 96397286 bound to https://moonn.ru.
No duplicate/legacy counter is bound accidentally.
Registry records the date of binding and screenshot/fact evidence.

work_items.title: Create contextual page SEO templates by cluster
work_items.reason: User explicitly requires contextual SEO, not one shared SEO block for every page.
work_items.implementation_boundary: Generate templates by page cluster, then per-page manifests before Tilda edits.
acceptance_checks: Each page has a search intent cluster.
Each page has unique title, description, H1, image alt plan, canonical, and schema type.
Cluster templates do not overwrite page-specific context.
